qa_pairs.question: What commands should a user run if AnsysEDT crashes and won't restart?
qa_pairs.answer: If AnsysEDT crashes and won't restart, try running the following commands in the terminal: `pkill -9 -u $USER -f "ansys*|mono|mwrpcss|apip-standalone-service"` followed by `rm -rf ~/.mw`. The second command will cause AnsysEDT to re-run its first-time configuration upon the next startup.

qa_pairs.question: How do researchers configure their AnsysEDT license file to utilize the SHARCNET Ansys license on an Alliance cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To use the SHARCNET Ansys license for AnsysEDT modules on any Alliance cluster, researchers need to configure their `~/.licenses/ansys.lic` file. This file should contain two lines: `setenv("ANSYSLMD_LICENSE_FILE", "1055@license3.sharcnet.ca")` and `setenv("ANSYSLI_SERVERS", "2325@license3.sharcnet.ca")`.
